steps.title: Keep the subject intact
steps.content: The blank supplies the subject of "asserts." The phrase "physicist Mishkat Bhattacharya" is a title plus name functioning as one noun phrase, so no comma should split the title from the name or the subject from the verb.

steps.title: Rule out comma errors
steps.content: A places a comma between the subject and "asserts." B splits the title from the name. D makes both errors. The unpunctuated noun phrase preserves the subject-verb connection. The answer is C.
